import Mathlib

open Lean Nat Int

def Random : Type := {}
def args : Array Int := []
def main : IO Unit := do
  let a : Int := - <| Random.sample (fun i => ∥i < 0∥.some (fun _ => - i)) args
  let b : Int := - <| Random.sample (fun i => ∥i < 0∥.some (fun _ => - i)) args
  loop a b

def loop (a : Int) (b : Int) : IO Unit := do
  when (a > b) do
    let temp := b
    b := b + a
    a := a + 1
    loop a b

def init (main : IO Unit) : IO Unit := do
  main

def overflow (a b : Int) : Prop := ∥a > Int.maxInt∥ ∨ ∥b > Int.maxInt∥

def LTL (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ σ : Stream Prop, p ∧ ∀ i, σ i ⟹ p (σ (i + 1))

def G (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ σ : Stream Prop, p (σ 0) ∧ ∀ i, p (σ i) ⟹ p (σ (i + 1))

def check (p : Prop) : IO Unit := do
  let σ := unfold Stream.unfold (fun _ => some (p >> pure)) []
  let _ := IO.println "Checking property:"
  let _ := IO.println (stringOfProp p)
  let _ := IO.println "Stream:"
  let _ := IO.println (String.join " " (List.map String.mkString "" (take 10 σ)))
  let _ := IO.println "Infinitely many instances:"
  let _ := IO.println (String.join " " (List.map String.mkString "" (map (fun i => String.mkString " " (List.take 10 (σ.get i))) (indices (Stream.length σ))))))
  let _ := IO.println "Checking LTL property:"
  let _ := IO.println (stringOfProp (LTL p))
  let _ := IO.println "Done."

check (G (λ _ => ¬ overflow)) (init main)

open Lean.Elab.Tactic.Context
open Lean.Elab.Tactic.Simple

def init : Nat := 0

def main : IO Unit := do
  let h ← get_option hostEnt "localhost"
  let _ ← net_reopen h
  pure unit

def net_reset : Unit := do
  let batch_at ← ref (fstTTL - 1)
  alter_state fun s => { s with net_batch_at := batch_at }

def net_send_batch : IO Unit := do
  let i ← ref (fstTTL - 1)
  while i < <|! net_batch_at do
  let host_addr ← get_option hostEnt (string.to_string i.toNat)
  let host ← match host_addr with
    | some h => pure h
    | none => do
      abort "Host not found"

  let addr := host.hAddr
  match addr with
  | inet_addr ip => do
    let unspec_addr := ⊤ -- Define unspec_addr here
    let addr_is_unspec := addr == unspec_addr
    unless addr_is_unspec $ do
      let _ ← addrcmp addr unspec_addr af
      pure unit
    alter_state fun s => { s with net_batch_at := i }
  | _ => do
    abort "Invalid address type"
  pure unit

def net_reopen (addr : Option hostEnt) : IO Unit := do
  match addr with
  | some h => do
    let af := h.hAddrType
    case af of
      | 2 => pure unit -- IPv4
      | 10 => pure unit -- IPv6
      | _ => do
        abort "Unsupported address type"

    net_reset()
    net_send_batch()
  | none => do
    abort "Invalid host"

def get_option (name : String) : IO (Option hostEnt) := do
  let mut h ← ref none
  let fd ← openFile name readOnly ∘| ioErrDo
  if fd ≥ 0 then do
    let buf ← readAll fd
    let lines ← splitOn "\n" buf
    for line in lines do
      let parts ← splitOn ":" line do
        if parts.length = 2 then
          match parts[0].toSubstringFrom 0 3 with
            | "host:" => do
              let name ← parts[1].trim
              let h_entry ← getHostByName name
              h ← some h_entry
              break
    closeFile fd
  pure h

def getHostByName (name : String) : IO hostEnt := do
  let mut h ← ref nullPtr
  let res ← getaddrinfo name nullPtr nullPtr DNS_STREAM socktypeIPv4 0 do
    if res ≥ 0 then do
      h ← cast h (getHostByAddr (inet_ntoa (getnameinfo (res, nullMutable ptr, nullMutable ptr, nullMutable ptr, 0, 0)))).h_addr
    closeSocket res
  pure h

def inet_ntoa (addr : in_addr) : String := do
  let bytes ← toList (unpack addr)
  let str ← foldl (fun acc b => acc ++ [string.char (int.toChar (32 - b.s_b <<< 5) ++ string.char (int.toChar (b.s_b >>> 3 & 0b11111111))) ""] []) "" bytes
  pure str

def addrcmp (a b : MemPtr (Option addr)) (af : Nat) : IO Bool := do
  let a_addr ← readOption a
  let b_addr ← readOption b
  let a_is_unspec := a_addr == unspec_addr
  let b_is_unspec := b_addr == unspec_addr
  if a_is_unspec && b_is_unspec then pure true
  else if a_is_unspec then pure false
  else if b_is_unspec then pure false
  else do
    let a_ip := a_addr.s_addr
    let b_ip := b_addr.s_addr
    let a_is_match := a_ip == b_ip
    pure a_is_match

def unspec_addr : addr := { s_addr := 0 }

def fstTTL : Nat := 256

def af : Nat := 2 -- Assume IPv4 for simplicity

def host : Array hostEnt := repeatN 256 (monadicLiftIO (getHostByName "localhost"))

def net_batch_at : Ref Nat := ref (fstTTL - 1)

def net_send_batch_loop : IO Unit := do
  let i ← ref (fstTTL - 1)
  while i < <|! net_batch_at do
    let host_addr ← getOption hostEnt (string.to_string i.toNat)
    let host ← match host_addr with
      | some h => pure h
      | none => do
        abort "Host not found"

    let addr := host.hAddr
    match addr with
    | inet_addr ip => do
      let unspec_addr := ⊤ -- Define unspec_addr here
      let addr_is_unspec := addr == unspec_addr
      unless addr_is_unspec $ do
        let _ ← addrcmp addr unspec_addr af
        pure unit
      alter_state fun s => { s with net_batch_at := i }
    | _ => do
      abort "Invalid address type"
    pure unit
  pure unit

def main' : IO Unit := do
  let h ← getOption hostEnt "localhost"
  let _ ← net_reopen h
  net_send_batch_loop
  pure unit

init ▸ main'

-- Properties
def valid_free : Property (IO Unit) := ∀ (s : State), s.net_batch_at ≤ 255 → s.net_batch_at ≥ 0
def valid_deref : Property (IO Unit) := ∀ (s : State), s.net_batch_at ≥ 0 → isSome (getOption hostEnt (string.to_string s.net_batch_at))
def valid_memtrack : Property (IO Unit) := ∀ (s : State), s.net_batch_at ≥ 0 → isSome (getOption hostEnt (string.to_string s.net_batch_at)) → s.net_batch_at' = s.net_batch_at

CHECK( init(main'), LTL(G valid_free) )
CHECK( init(main()), LTL(G valid_deref) )
CHECK( init(main()), LTL(G valid_memtrack) )

open Lean.Util.ScopedId

def init (main : Name) : Stmt := do
  let input := constM 10
  let result := expr.app (name.mkId "id" <| [input])
  let cond := expr.eq result (constM 10)
  let err := name.mkId "reach_error"
  let error := do
    let _ <- expr.anonymous
    let _ <- expr.app (name.mkId "abort" [])
    let _ <- expr.app (name.mkId "__assert_fail" [strLit "0", strLit "id_i10_o10-1.c", numLit 4, err])
    stx.mkNone
  let stmt := stx.mkLetIn [("input", input), ("result", result)] (stx.mkIf cond error (stx.mkNone))
  return stmt

def LTL.G (p : Expr) : Expr := ∀ (s : State), p s
def LTL.call (name : Name) : Expr := ∃ (s : State), (name s) ≠ 0

def check : Stmt := do

import Mathlib

open Lean Nat Int Enum Lean.Nat.Basic Lean.Nat.Add Lean.Nat.Sub Lean.Nat.Eq

def bool : Type := Enum.Bool

def init : IO Unit := do
  let x ← randomInt (-65535) 65535
  let y ← randomInt (-65535) 65535
  return ()

def main : IO Unit := do
  let ℰx ← init
  let mut x : Int := x
  let mut y : Int := y
  let mut i : Nat := 0
  while x ≥ 0 do
    i := i + 1
    x := x + y
    y := -2 * y - 1
  return i

def F : Prop := ∀ i : Nat, i = 0

def end : Prop := false

def LTL_F_end (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ i : Nat, ∃ j : Nat, i < j → p j

def LTL_F : Prop := LTL_F_end F

def LTL (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ σ : Stream Prop, ∃ w : Stream Prop, ∀ i : Nat, w i = p i ∧ ∀ j : Nat, i < j → w j = p j → w (i + 1) = p (i + 1)

def main_prop : Prop := LTL (F end)

check init.run >>= fun () => main.run >>= fun i => main_prop.mprovable

import Mathlib

open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Elab.Expression

namespace Main

def init (main : Unit) : Option Nat := some 0

def end : Prop := false

def main' : Nat → Nat → Option Nat := λ (x : Nat) (y : Nat),
  if (x < 0) then none else
    some (x + y)

def main'' : Nat → Nat → Option Nat := λ (x : Nat) (y : Nat),
  if (x < 0) then none else
    some (x - y)

def ltl_F_end (x : Nat) (y : Nat) : Prop :=
 ∀ n : Nat, x + n * y < 0 → x + (n + 1) * y >= 0

def main : Unit := do
  let ⟨x⟩ ← expression.const `x` <|> return none
  let ⟨y⟩ ← expression.const `y` <|> return none
  let? x' ← main' x y
  let? y' ← expression.const `(-2 * y - 1)` <|> return (expression.const `(-2 * y - 1)`)
  let ltl : Prop := ∀ n : Nat, ltl_F_end x x' y' n
  let _ := assume (x >= 0)
  let _ := assume (y >= 0)
  let _ := assume (x' = x + y)
  let _ := assume (y' = (-2) * y - 1)
  let _ := assume (ltl)
  let _ := assume (x + (succ n) * y >= 0)
  exact true

end Main

@[init, main]
def _ : Unit := Main.main

end

import Mathlib

open Lean Nat Int

def init (main : IO Unit) : IO Unit := do
  pure ()

def end : Prop := false

def main' : Nat → Nat → Nat → Nat → Nat → Prop := λ (n : Nat) (p : Nat) (q : Nat) (r : Nat) (h : Nat),
  q.pow 4 = n ∧ p.pow 2 = p ∧ h = p + q ∧ r >= h ∧ p + q = r - h ∧ h.pow 3 = h.pow 3 - 12 * n + 16 * p + 12 * r - 16 * p * r - h - 4 * p

theorem init_main : init (main') = pure unit := rfl

theorem LTL_end : ∀ (s : Stream Nat), LTL.F end.toProp s ↔ false := rfl

theorem main_LTL_end : LTL.F end ∧ init_main.symm → ∀ (n : Nat) (p : Nat) (q : Nat) (r : Nat) (h : Nat), main' n p q r h → false :=
by intros s hnpqr h => contradiction

theorem main : init (main') → LTL.F end := by apply LTL.check s (main_LTL_end hnpqr)

CHECK (init (main'), LTL.F end)

open Lean Nat

def init : IO Unit := do
  let n := randomInt 1 32
  let counter := ref 0
  let hanoi' (n : Nat) : Nat := if hSuc n = zero then one else 2 * (hanoi' (pred n)) + one
  let applyHanoi' (n : Nat) (from : Nat) (to : Nat) (via : Nat) : IO Unit := do
    modifyRef! counter fun c => c + 1
    when (n > zero) do
      applyHanoi' (pred n) via to from
    applyHanoi' (pred n) from from via
  let result := hanoi' n
  return (counter === result)

def main : IO Unit := do
  let ℛ := ∥ fun _ => true ∥
  let _ := init
  let _ := runLTL ℛ (const G fun _ => ∥ fun _ => ¬ (counter > maxInt) ∥)
  pure unit

def hanoi (n : Nat) : Nat := if n = zero then one else 2 * (hanoi (pred n)) + one
def applyHanoi (n : Nat) (from : Nat) (to : Nat) (via : Nat) : IO Unit := do
  when (n > zero) do
    modifyRef! counter fun c => c + 1
    applyHanoi (pred n) via to from
  applyHanoi (pred n) from from via

def overflow : Prop := counter > maxInt
def G : Prop := ∀ _, ¬ overflow
def LTL (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ σ : Stream Prop, p ∧ ∀ i, ∀ j < i, σ i ⟹ σ j → p

def runLTL (m : IO Prop) (p : Prop) : IO Unit := do
  let mut σ := stream.empty (IO.unit : IO Prop)
  let mut last := false
  let mut done := false
  let mut i := zero
  repeat fun loop => do
    let state := m
    match state with
    | some prop => do
      let _ := ⊥ unless prop
      let _ := modifyRef! σ fun s => cons prop s
      let _ := modifyRef! i (succ i)
      let _ := unless last do
        let _ := println "State: " >> pure prop >>= putStrLn
      set last true
    | none => do
      let _ := modifyRef! done true
      let _ := println "Error: Verification failed"
      pure unit
    let _ := unless done do
      let _ := pause 1000
      let _ := loop

def const (f : Prop) : Prop := fun _ => f

def main' : IO Unit := do
  let _ := runLTL (init >>= fun _ => pure unit) (const G)
  pure unit

def rec (a : Nat) : Nat :=
if a = 0 then 0
else do {

theorem rec_base : rec 0 = 0

theorem rec_step (h : rec (n : Nat) = p) : rec (n.pred) = p.pred :=
begin
  let res : Nat := rec (n.pred)
  let h' : Nat := Nat.dec! res
  have h'' : h.symm.trans (Nat.succ_eq_add_one h.symm) := by rw [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, h]
  have h''' : p.pred = res.pred := by rw [h'']
  rw [h] at h''
  rw [h'']

| 0 => by apply rec_base
| (n + 1) => by apply rec_step

def run_LTL : LTLFormula → State → Bool

| ⊥ _ => false
| (G p) s => p s && run_LTL p s
| (F p) s => ¬ p s || run_LTL p s

| (p1 → p2) s => ¬ run_LTL p1 s || run_LTL p2 s

| (p1 ⊻ p2) s => (run_LTL p1 s <-> ¬ run_LTL p2 s)
| (p1 ⊕ p2) s => (run_LTL p1 s <-> (run_LTL p2 s ∨ run_LTL p1 s))

| (p1 ⊤ p2) s := true

| (p1 ↔ₙ p2) s := if h : run_LTL p1 (nextState s) = run_LTL p2 (nextState s) then h else by { rwa [h, not_not] }
| (p1 ∧⁰ p2) s := run_LTL p1 s && run_LTL p2 s
| (p1 ∨⁰ p2) s := run_LTL p1 s <| run_LTL p2 s
| (p1 ∧ⁱ p2) s := run_LTL p1 s && run_LTL p2 (nextState s)
| (p1 ∨ⁱ p2) s := run_LTL p1 s <| run_LTL p2 (nextState s)
| (p1 ∧⁺ p2) s := run_LTL p1 s && run_LTL p2 (nextState s) && run_LTL p1 (nextState (nextState s)) && run_LTL p2 (nextState (nextState s))

import Mathlib

open Lean Nat

def fibonacci (n : Nat) : Nat :=
if hNat.zero? n then 0
else if hNat.succ_eq_zero n then 1
else fibonacci (hNat.pred n) + fibonacci (hNat.pred (hNat.pred n))

def init' : IO Unit := do
  let x ← randomNat ℕ 47
  pure ()

def main' : IO Unit := do
  let x ← randomNat ℕ 47
  match x with
  | (some x) =>
    have hx : x ≤ 46 := nat.le_of_int_le x 46
    have hresult : fibonacci x = x.succ.succ := by
      induction x with x ih
      { simp only [hx, hNat.zero_succ, hNat.succ_zero, fibonacci, h_] }
      { simp only [hx, hNat.succ_le_self, hNat.succ_succ, fibonacci, h_] }
    unless hresult do
      reach_error
      abort
    pure ()
  | none => pure ()

def reach_error : Unit := panic! "reach_error"

def check : IO Bool := do
  init'
  pure (∀ ℕ x, ¬ (x = 5 ∧ fibonacci x = 3))

def main : IO Unit := do
  check
  pure ()

def LTL_G_not_call_reach_error : Prop := ∀ σ : Stream Nat, ¬ (∃ i, i < length σ ∧ call reach_error σ i)

def check' : IO Unit := do
  let σ ← stream.unfoldM (λ i, if hNat.zero? i then none else some (fibonacci i, succ i)) 0
  pure (∀ i, i < length σ ∨ ¬ call reach_error σ i)

def CHECK (): IO Unit := do
  main'
  check'
  pure ()

def runCheck : IO Unit := do
  set_option linter.uppercase true
  CHECK
  pure ()

open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Tactics
open Lean.Expr
open Lean.Syntax
open Lean.Util.Tactics

def init (e : Expr) : Expr := e

def call (s : String) : Expr := do {
  let name ← get_local "reach_error"
  let sym ← get_local name
  let app ← apply sym []
  return app
}

def LTL.G (p : Expr) : Expressions := l"G" <| Expr.App (get_local "false" <| get_not) p

def LTL.not (e : Expr) : Expr := Expr.App (get_local "not" <| get_local "ff") e

def LTL.LTL (g : Expr) (p : Expr) : Expr := Expr.App (get_local "LTL" <| get_local "And") g p

def main : Expr := do {
  let N ← get_local "N"
  let cond ← expr.app [N] <| get_local "<=<>"
  let zero ← get_local "0"
  let two ← get_local "2"
  let size ← get_local "sizeof"
  let int_type ← get_local "int"
  let N_is_nonneg ← get_local "N <= 0"
  let N_is_small ← get_local "N <= 2147483647 / sizeof int"
  let assume_abort_if_not ← get_local "assume_abort_if_not"
  let malloc ← get_local "malloc"
  let i ← for_some "i" <| freshX
  let sum ← freshX "sum"
  let a ← freshX "a"
  let init_sum ← get_local "sum"
  let for_i ← for "i" in range zero N <| get_local "for"
  let cond_i_even ← get_local "i % 2 == 0"
  let assign_a_i ← if cond_i_even then (get_local "a" <| get_index [i]) <| get_local ":" <| get_local "20" else get_local "a" <| get_index [i] <| get_local ":" <| get_local "0"
  let update_sum ← if (get_index [zero] sum) <| get_local ":" <| get_local ":" <| get_index [i] a <| get_local "+"
  let assert_sum_bound ← get_local "sum[0] <= 2 * N"

  let stmt_seq ← [
    assign N <| get_local ":" <| get_local "N" <| get_local "=" <| get_local "VERIFIER_nondet_int" []
    assume N_is_nonneg
    assume N_is_small

    let stmt_seq_alloc ← [
      assign a <| get_local ":" <| get_local "a" <| get_local ":" <| get_local "malloc" [] <| get_local "(" <| size int_type N <| get_local ")"
    ]

    for_i >>= fun i => do {
      assign a <| get_index [i] a <| assign_a_i
    }

    let stmt_seq_sum ← for_i >>= fun i => do {
      assign sum <| get_index [zero] sum <| if (i.getEq zero) then get_local ":" <| get_local "0" else update_sum
    }

    assume assert_sum_bound
  ]

  init (main) >>= fun init_main => do {
    let stmt_seq_main ← get_local "stmt_seq" <| freshX
    let seq ← [init_main, stmt_seq_alloc, stmt_seq, assert_sum_bound]

    let ltl_formula ← LTL.LTL (LTL.G (LTL.not (call "reach_error"))) (get_local "call" <| get_index [zero] stmt_seq)

    let goal ← get_goal
    let tactic ← do {
      let tactic ← tacticMono "init" <| init_main
      let tactic ← tacticMono "alloc" <| tactic_sequence seq
      let tactic ← tacticMono "sum" <| tactic_sequence stmt_seq_sum
      let tactic ← tacticMono "assert" <| tacticMono "sum_bound" <| tacticMono "LTL" <| get_local "CHECK" <| get_local "init" <| get_local "(" <| init_main <| get_local ")" <| ltl_formula
      return tactic
    }

    runTactic tactic
  }
}

open Lean Nat Enumerable Function

def bool : Type := ∀ (a : Type), Type
def false : bool a := Σ (p : a), Prop
def true : bool a := Σ (p : a), Prop

def init (main : IO Unit) : IO Unit := do
  let x ← nat.nondet
  let y ← nat.nondet
  pure unit

import Mathlib

open Lean
open Nat
open Option
open Function
open Enumerable

def bool : Type := ∥false, true∫

def init (main : IO Unit) : IO Unit := do
  let mut x ← pure ∫
  let mut y ← pure ∫
  while (x ≥ 0) ∧ (y ≥ 0) do
  do
    y ← pure (sub_int y 1)
    match y < 0 with
    | some _ => do
      x ← pure (sub_int x 1)
      y ← pure (randomIO ∫)
    | none => pure unit
  pure unit

def defBehavior : Stream Nat → Stream Nat → Prop := ∫ x y => x > y

def G (S : Stream Nat) : Prop := ∀ i, i < length S → defBehavior (drop i S) (take (i + 1) S)

def LTL (p : Prop) : Prop := ∀ s, p (iterate id s)

CHECK (init main, LTL (fun s => ∃ i, i < length s → G (drop i s) (take (i + 1) s)))

open Lean.Elab.Tactics.Context
open Lean.Elab.Tactics.Expression

def id (x : Nat) : Nat :=
  if h : x = 0 then 0
  else do { let h1 <- id x.pred; let h2 <- 1 < h1; assume h3 : h2 <= 2; pure h1 + 1 }

def init' (main : Unit) : Unit := do
  let input <- pure <| nat.nondet_unif
  let result <- apply id input
  assume h : result ≠ 3
  pure ()

def init (main : Unit) : Unit := do
  init' main
  pure ()

def LTL_F_end : Prop := ∀ (s : Stream Nat), ∀ (x : Nat), s.cons x ≠ Stream.cons 3

def check : Init := do
  let ℛ <- init main
  let ℛ' <- check_init ℛ
  let _ <- assume h : LTL_F_end ℛ'
  pure h

init init main

import Mathlib

open Lean.Elab.Tactics
open Lean.Parser.Tactics
open Lean.Meta
open Lean.Syntax
open Lean.Util.Inhabited

def init : IO Unit := do
  let N ← readNat "N"
  let cond := N > 0
  let cond' := N <= 2147483647 / sizeOf <| ofNat 8
  let a := do
    let ptr ← alloc (N * sizeOf <| ofNat 4)
    pure (ofAddress ptr)
  let mut i : Nat := 0
  let mut a_list : Array Int := []
  let mut a_ptr := a.get!
  for i in [0..N-1] do
    let new_val := (i + 1) * (i + 1)
    a_list := push a_list new_val
    a_ptr := store new_val a_ptr (i * sizeOf <| ofNat 4)
  for i in [0..N-1] do
    a_ptr := store (a_list.get! i - i) a_ptr (i * sizeOf <| ofNat 4)
  for i in [0..N-1] do
    let expected := i + 1
    let actual := load a_ptr (i * sizeOf <| ofNat 4)
    have h := assume (expected = actual)
  return ()

def valid_free : Prop := ∀ (p : Ptr), p ≠ null → init ≥| p

def valid_deref : Prop := ∀ (p : Ptr), p ≠ null → init ≥| p → Int

def valid_memtrack : Prop := ∀ (p : Ptr), p ≠ null → init ≥| p → ∀ i, i < (length init) → a.get! i = (ofAddress p).load i

set_option pp.all false in
#check init
#check valid_free
#check valid_deref
#check valid_memtrack

-- Main function to check the property
def check_properties : IO Unit := do
  let ⊥ := false.mmap fun _ => fail! "Error: Uninitialized memory"
  let h_free := runInit init
  let h_deref := runInit $ for i in [0..N-1] do (h_free.map fun _ => load h_free i (i * sizeOf <| ofNat 4)).mmap fun x => x = ofNat (i + 1)
  let h_memtrack := runInit $ for i in [0..N-1] do (h_free.map fun _ => load h_free i (i * sizeOf <| ofNat 4)).map fun x => a_list.get! i = x
  let h := ∧ h_free h_deref h_memtrack
  let _ := assume h
  return ()

-- Main function to run the checker
def main : IO Unit := do
  init
  check_properties
  return ()

#eval main

-- Tactic to check LTL properties
def check_LTL (p : Prop) : IO Unit := do
  let ⊥ := false.mmap fun _ => fail! "Error: Uninitialized memory"
  let h := runInit p
  let _ := assume h
  return ()

-- Main function to check LTL properties
def check : IO Unit := do
  let _ := check_LTL $ LTL.G.valid_free
  let _ := check_LTL $ LTL.G.valid_deref
  let _ := check_LTL $ LTL.G.valid_memtrack
  return ()

#eval check

-- Main function to run the program
def main' : IO Unit := do
  init
  check
  return ()

#eval main'

namespace Main

def init : IO Unit := do
  let x ← randomInt.generate Nat.max Int.maxInt
  let a := 16
  let mut b : Nat := a
  while b <= a do
    b := if x >= 0 then x.and b else x.succ
  pure ()

def G : Prop := ∀ (n : Nat), a > b → ¬ (a + 1 = b)

def overflow : Prop := a + 1 = b

def LTL_G_not_overflow : Prop := ∀ (i : Nat), ∧ (i < (Nat.max Int.maxInt)) (G i.toNat (a > b))

def main : IO Unit := do
  init
  have h := LTL_G_not_overflow.repeat
  pure h

end Main

namespace Tactic
open Interactive

def checkMain : IO Unit := do
  let ⟨_⟩ ← runMainM (Main.init >>= Main.main)
  have h := Main.G.repeat
  trace "Proof check passed: {Main.G}"
  pure ()
end Tactic

def init : IO Unit := do
  let mut A : Array Int := []
  for i in ∀ i, 0 .. 1023 do
    push_lhs!
    let this := ↦ i
    A := push_append! A (pure this) (pure (i))
  pure ()

def valid_free : Prop := ∀ i, i < Array.length A → A.get! i = i

def valid_deref : Prop := ∀ i, i < Array.length A → is_some (A.get! i)

def valid_memtrack : Prop := ∀ i, i < Array.length A → i = Array.index_of A (pure i)

def reach_error : IO Unit := do
  IO.fail "reach_error"

def main : IO Unit := do
  init

  let hℵ0 : valid_free ℵ0 := sorry
  let hvalid_derefℵ0 : valid_deref ℵ0 := sorry
  let hvalid_memtrackℵ0 : valid_memtrack ℵ0 := sorry

  let hvalid_derefℵ0' : valid_deref ℵ0 := assume hvalid_derefℵ0
  let hvalid_memtrackℵ0' : valid_memtrack ℵ0 := assume hvalid_memtrackℵ0
  let h : LTL.Property := LTL.G.mk hℵ0 hvalid_derefℵ0 hvalid_memtrackℵ0
